mapper.select: SELECT notice_id, title, writer_id, writer, content, created_at, updated_at FROM notice ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, writer_id, writer, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{writerId}, #{writer}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
